options.name: -no_design_data
options.description: Specifies whether design data to be saved or not (by default data will be saved.)

options.name: -out_dir
options.description: Specifies the location of output directory (by default go to a directory name starting with tmp_qrc_.)

options.name: -rc_corners
options.description: Specifies the rc_corners to include in the extraction spec ((rc_corner)+, optional)
